use_codes.desc: A METHOD FOR THE IMPROVEMENT OF NEUROLOGICAL OUTCOME BY REDUCING THE INCIDENCE AND SEVERITY OF ISCHEMIC DEFICITS IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH SUBARACHNOID HEMORRHAGE (SAH) FROM RUPTURED INTRACRANIAL BERRY ANEURYSMS

indications.text:
NYMALIZE is indicated for the improvement of neurological outcome by reducing the incidence and severity
of ischemic deficits in adult patients with subarachnoid hemorrhage (SAH) from ruptured intracranial berry
aneurysms regardless of their post-ictus neurological condition (i.e., Hunt and Hess Gra...
